full_text:
Cao Ang (Zixiu) 曹昂 (子脩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Ang (曹昂), styledZixiu (子脩). Served Wei. Cao Cao’s first son. Died to save his father. Cao Ang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Ang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
